name: Mr. Mint
description:
"You gotta relax! This is Candy Land! And Candy Land means FUN!"

Candy Land: The Great Lollipop Adventure (2005) movie
Yes, there is a Candy Land movie that is based of the candy Land (2002) board game.

For those who love clown characters, I really enjoy Mr. Mint. He is a fun and chill character (see the pun)?

If you are looking for a candy adventure and a comfort character, he is your guy!
